input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.2.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.2.5.3
            TITLE: helmet mounted cameras and helmet camera mounts are prohibited.

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.2.5.3: Helmet mounted cameras and helmet camera mounts are prohibited.
VE.2.5.3 Helmet mounted cameras and helmet camera mounts are prohibited.

final_answer: Helmet mounted cameras and helmet camera mounts are prohibited.
